task_text: Meridian Group has asked for a product demo of Helios in two weeks. Based on what you can find in the sandbox, write a short assessment (3-4 paragraphs) of whether we are ready to demo and what, if anything, needs to be resolved first. Save it as demo_readiness_assessment.txt.

input.content:
I was unable to complete a substantive sandbox-based readiness review because the sandbox file listing could not be accessed: attempts to list the working directory returned a missing-directory error. As a result, I could not verify the current Helios product status, demo materials, known issues, customer requirements, or any existing readiness notes for Meridian Group.

Given that limitation, we should not assume we are ready to demo Helios to Meridian Group in two weeks. Before confirming the demo, the team should verify that the core demo flow is working end to end, that any Meridian-specific use cases are supported, and that the environment contains stable data and credentials suitable for a customer-facing walkthrough.

The main item to resolve first is access to the relevant sandbox materials so the readiness assessment can be grounded in actual project information. Once access is restored, the team should review product status, open blockers, release notes, and demo scripts, then make a go/no-go decision with enough time to fix any critical issues before the scheduled demo window.
